name: trust-strip
title: Trust Strip
description: A monochrome trust row of wide-tracked mono wordmarks that fade in with an opacity-only left-to-right stagger, then hold dead still.
evidence: Video Primitives Wave J J1-8 trust-strip contract; cohere-north-launch 06-proof trust strip

variables.label: Marks
variables.default: Northwind, Acme Corp, Globex, Initech, Umbra

variables.label: Tone
variables.description: Mark color: quiet muted or full-contrast ink.

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated reveal starts in seconds from mount start. Empty uses the authored 0.15s stagger.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Faint palette tint mixed into the mark color.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: End-of-clip behavior. None holds to the last frame.
